meaning: n.鏁欎細濮斿憳,闄跺埗鐨勯暱鐑熸枟
examples: The churchwarden had certainly played a decisive part.
The original complaint made to the church in 2008 concerned the alleged abusive behaviour of a churchwarden.
The review investigated how a claim of abusive behaviour by a churchwarden was dealt with by the dean, and found he had mishandled the complaint.
The Dean, the Very Reverend Bob Key, was suspended by the Bishop of Winchester over his handling of a vulnerable adult's complaint he was abused by a churchwarden.
